message:
🌱 Add kubeedge: Change to use gomod to manage the dependencies mission (#1555)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubeedge-748-change-to-use-gomod-to-manage-the-dependencies",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubeedge: Change to use gomod to manage the dependencies",
+    "description": "Change to use gomod to manage the dependencies. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubeedge deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubeedge version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeedge -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeedge\nhelm list -n kubeedge 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubeedge installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubeedge configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubeedge configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubeedge -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeedge\nkubectl get configmap -n kubeedge -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubeedge\n```\n**What would you like to be added**:\nUse gomod to manage the dependies and remove the vendor from the project\n\n**Why is this needed**:\nTo manage the dependiences more efficient"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Change to use gomod to manage the dependencies",
+        "description": "We have also to increase the version of k8s.io/[kubernetes,api,...]. The kubernetes package include docker and I run into the same sirupsen error. \n\nCurrently I use ``gotip`` instead of ```go```.  Gotip shows the include path, so we can identify the package which make problems. As an\n```yaml\n$go mod vendor\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types/network latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/client latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types/filters latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types/strslice latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types/container latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types/image latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api latest\ngo: github.com/Sirupsen/logrus@v1.4.2: parsing go.mod: unexpected module path \"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\ngo: error load\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade kubeedge to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kubeedge:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade kubeedge kubeedge/kubeedge --namespace kubeedge\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeedge\nhelm list -n kubeedge\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeedge -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeedge\nkubectl get events -n kubeedge --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Change to use gomod to manage the dependencies\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "We have also to increase the version of k8s.io/[kubernetes,api,...]. The kubernetes package include docker and I run into the same sirupsen error. \n\nCurrently I use ``gotip`` instead of ```go```.  Gotip shows the include path, so we can identify the package which make problems.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$go mod vendor\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types/network latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/client latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types/filters latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types/strslice latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types/container latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api/types/image latest\ngo: finding github.com/docker/docker/api latest\ngo: github.com/Sirupsen/logrus@v1.4.2: parsing go.mod: unexpected module path \"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\ngo: error loading module requirements",
+        "$ gotip mod vendor\ngo: github.com/kubeedge/kubeedge/edge/pkg/edged imports\n    k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime imports\n    github.com/docker/docker/pkg/sysinfo imports\n    github.com/Sirupsen/logrus: github.com/Sirupsen/logrus@v1.4.2: parsing go.mod: unexpected module path \"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"",
+        "make[1]: Entering directory '/home/subpath/data/git/arbeit/kubeedge/edge'\ngo build cmd/edge_core.go\n# github.com/google/cadvisor/http\n../../../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/google/cadvisor@v0.29.2/http/handlers.go:101:33: too many arguments in call to prometheus.NewProcessCollector\n\thave (int, string)\n\twant (prometheus.ProcessCollectorOpts)\nmake[1]: *** [Makefile:5: edge_core] Error 2"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubeedge",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },
